role: Fleet.tsx is a canvas region panel that renders the live model registry as a grouped, refreshable surface for chat and embed model kinds.
capabilities: Display live model registry grouped by chat/embed kind
Show per-kind model count via LaneHead chip
Show total live-model count in SectionHead Badge
Surface registry fetch errors as fail-loud kit Surface cards
Manual live refresh via button calling refreshFleet
Loading state indicator while fleet data is fetched
Kind monogram and honest live-registry dot with visible legend
Consistent shared-kit styling via SectionHead, LaneHead, Badge, Surface, EmptyState
substance_why: It fully consumes fleet state, renders both kind groups, handles errors and loading, provides refresh and legend, and is built from the shared kit.
interactions_present: Title tooltip on refresh button explains re-probe action
Title tooltip on live-registry dot explains honest liveness meaning
interactions_missing: No per-model actions (select, copy, details) — rows are intentionally non-clickable
No search, filter, or sort of model lists
No per-kind retry or collapse controls
No keyboard navigation or focus management
performance_risks: FleetKind and model rows are unmemoized, causing full re-render on every fleet update
No virtualization for long model lists
Total count is recomputed every render
reuse_why: The data model, grouping logic, and kit integration are sound, but the visual form and layout classes will be rebuilt in the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Extract FleetKind into its own component module
Extract each model row into a FleetModelItem component
Extract the legend into a separate FleetLegend component
Move KIND_TONE mapping and kind constants to shared config
Keep data fetching in AppContext/hook and keep this panel purely presentational
